page_title: "permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment Resource - terraform-provider-permit-io"

# permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment (Resource)

Assigns a role to a user on a specific resource instance within a tenant. This is for instance-level permissions (e.g., giving a user editor access to a specific document).

For tenant-level role assignments, use `permitio_role_assignment` instead.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Grant editor access to a specific document
resource "permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment" "doc_editor" {
  user              = "user@example.com"
  role              = "editor"
  tenant            = "default"
  resource          = "document"
  resource_instance = "doc-123"
}

# Grant admin access to a specific project
resource "permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment" "project_admin" {
  user              = "admin@example.com"
  role              = "admin"
  tenant            = "default"
  resource          = "project"
  resource_instance = "proj-456"
}

# Grant multiple instance-level permissions using for_each
resource "permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment" "document_permissions" {
  for_each = {
    "user1_doc1" = { user = "user1@example.com", doc = "doc-123" }
    "user2_doc2" = { user = "user2@example.com", doc = "doc-456" }
  }

  user              = each.value.user
  role              = "editor"
  tenant            = "default"
  resource          = "document"
  resource_instance = each.value.doc
}

# Use with data source
data "permitio_user" "example" {
  key = "user@example.com"
}

resource "permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment" "viewer" {
  user              = data.permitio_user.example.key
  role              = "viewer"
  tenant            = "production"
  resource          = "report"
  resource_instance = "report-789"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource` (String) Resource type (e.g., 'workspace', 'document')
- `resource_instance` (String) Resource instance key (e.g., 'ws-123', 'doc-456')
- `role` (String) Role key to assign
- `tenant` (String) Tenant key for scoped assignment
- `user` (String) User key to assign the role to

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the role assignment was created
- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the role assignment
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID
- `project_id` (String) Project ID
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated

## Import

Import resource instance role assignments using the format `user:role:resource:resource_instance:tenant`:

```shell
terraform import permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment.example "user@example.com:editor:document:doc-123:default"
```

Import examples:

```shell
# Import editor access to a document
terraform import permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment.doc_editor "user@example.com:editor:document:doc-123:default"

# Import admin access to a project
terraform import permitio_resource_instance_role_assignment.project_admin "admin@example.com:admin:project:proj-456:production"
```
